definitions: adj. 难以想象的 (在此语境下的释义)

examples.text:
industrialization, the modern world, 
the information age where we are today. Earth is truly ours now. We changed it in ways unfathomable a few 
short generations ago. We turned the land into fields worked by millions of machines, 
built thousands of gigantic jungles made of sand and metal. We split the atom and travelled 
to other worlds. Everything is different today.
